title: oplukion horridum
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", oplukion horridum (also known as Opuntia powder) may help lower the levels of TC, LDL-C, AI, and TG in hyperlipemia wistar rats and reduce the level of MDA while increasing SOD activities, which could contribute to its potential benefits in regulating blood lipids.
side_effects: Oplukion horridum can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as a result of its high toxicity levels. Ingestion of the plant can also lead to respiratory problems, including difficulty breathing and wheezing, due to the irritation it causes in the lungs. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can cause skin irritation, including redness, itching, and rashes, and may even lead to allergic reactions in some individuals. In severe cases, improper use of oplukion horridum can cause cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and decreased blood pressure.
